value.found_quote: MCP servers can be configured in several ways depending on your needs: ### Option 1: Add a remote HTTP server ... ### Option 2: Add a remote SSE server ... ### Option 3: Add a local stdio server
value.rationale: The page describes configuring MCP servers per-server with different transport types, including HTTP, SSE, and stdio (plus WebSocket). The `--transport` flag is set per server, and JSON configs specify the transport `type` per server. This directly substantiates "transport types selected per server (stdio, HTTP/SSE)." Note the page marks SSE as deprecated, but HTTP and stdio are active.
